case_title: SARAH PEAK VS. SCOTT L. CRABTREE

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-21-2011 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO NOV-28-2011 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT'S PROPERTY MANAGER WILLIAM DUFFOUR APPEARS. CASE CONTINUED FOR NAMED DEFENDANT TO APPEAR. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. JUDGE PRO TEM: BETSY JOHNSEN. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506) PROPERTY MANAGER WILLIAM DUFFOUR COMPLETES A DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE AND A STIPULATION FOR JPT.

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PEAK, SARAH ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-28-2011 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PEAK, SARAH IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CRABTREE, SCOTT L. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY PEAK, SARAH AS TO DEFENDANT CRABTREE, SCOTT L. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-21-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-28-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-28-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPREARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $35.00<WAIVED>) SERVED OCT-07-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CRABTREE, SCOTT L.
